category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes openiked-portable as an Internet Key Exchange version 2 daemon and portable OpenBSD iked.
source_facts.description: IKEv2 daemon - portable version of OpenBSD iked
display_name_sources: Official repository release and project name use OpenIKED.
source_facts.name is openiked and source_facts.homepage is openiked.org.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides build-from-source and setup notes; OpenBSD manual pages document iked, ikectl, and iked.conf.
source_facts.homepage identifies https://openiked.org as official homepage.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README build instructions clone https://github.com/openiked/openiked-portable.git.
Official GitHub repository openiked/openiked-portable describes itself as the portable version of OpenBSD iked.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository description states Internet Key Exchange version 2 daemon.
source_facts.description identifies an IKEv2 daemon and portable OpenBSD iked.
